steps.title: Tie estimate to first encounter
steps.content: The sentence says radiocarbon dating shows Machu Picchu is about 20 years older than scholars thought when first encountering the site in 1911. The blank must describe that first estimate.

steps.title: Reject irrelevant meanings
steps.content: Choice A means authentic, Choice B means deliberate, and Choice C means separate or self-directed. None refers to the estimate made at the beginning of scholarly knowledge about the site. The needed word means initial or first. The answer is D.
